feat.name: Stage Fighting
feat.text: You pull punches to give a better show. You don't take the usual –2 circumstance penalty when making a nonlethal attack with a weapon or unarmed attack that doesn't have the nonlethal trait.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.
